---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new function or feature for date-lite
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Why do you need it?

## Proposed solution

What API would you like to see?

```typescript
import { } from 'date-lite';

// Example usage of the proposed feature
```

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you considered.

## Additional context

- Is this function available in date-fns? If so, which one?
- Would this add significant bundle size?
- Are there edge cases to consider (DST, leap years, month-end)?
